observations.summary: The dualism contrasts the tempting offer of forgetfulness and comfort against the ongoing, exhausting climb toward an undefined goal.

left_evidence.quote: She was offering him forgetfulness. Comfort. A way to stop the endless, exhausting climb toward something he couldn't even name.

right_evidence.quote: Then he thought of his father, buried in his hoard, confusing accumulation for meaning.

bridge_evidence.quote: And for just a moment, he was tempted.
